title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Friday
summary: Irish mob boss arrested in Lanzarote, big temperature drop expected over the weekend in Spain, four Spanish film directors vie for top Cannes Festival prize and more news on Friday April 10th.

title: 'Drunk as a clam': How to say you've had too much to drink in Spanish
summary: Many languages have original and funny expressions to refer to the act of being under the influence, and Spanish is no exception to this.

title: Track broke day before Spain's deadly train accident and went undetected
summary: The track where a collision between two high-speed trains in Spain left 46 people dead in January broke the day before and went undetected, Spanish media reported investigators as saying on Wednesday.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Beach in Mallorca renamed 'Drunkards Beach' on Google Maps, Spain's PM welcomes Iran-US ceasefire but 'won't applaud those who set the world on fire' and more news on Thursday April 9th.

title: Ground staff pause airport strikes in Spain this week as negotiations begin
summary: Spanish trade unions on Wednesday announced that the next two stoppage days by ground handling staff at 12 airports will not go ahead as negotiations over work conditions have begun, following a week of walkouts which caused delays and baggage issues.
